writes.scripts/keelplane_run_summary.py:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
from pathlib import Path


def summarize(run_dir: Path) -> dict[str, object]:
    status = json.loads((run_dir / "status.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return {"decision": status.get("decision"), "valid": bool(status.get("valid"))}


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--run", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    Path(args.out).write_text(json.dumps(summarize(Path(args.run)), sort_keys=True) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
